profile.query: tell me retinols to use . My current age is 20
profile.normalized_query: tell me retinols to use . my current age is 20
active_safety_notes: Use retinol at night and pair it with daily sunscreen.
Start slowly and avoid combining it with strong exfoliating acids in the same routine.
At this age, prefer beginner-strength retinol only if there is a clear concern.

notes: Place retinol in the night treatment step, not the morning routine.
Use sunscreen every morning while using retinol.
Start active treatments slowly and keep barrier-support steps consistent.
Retinol should be used at night and paired with daily sunscreen.
Start 1-2 nights per week, then increase only if skin tolerates it.
At age 20 or nearby, prefer beginner-strength retinol and avoid using it without a clear concern.

components.title: Safety notes
components.message: Retinol should be used at night and paired with daily sunscreen.
items: Retinol should be used at night and paired with daily sunscreen.
Start 1-2 nights per week, then increase only if skin tolerates it.
At age 20 or nearby, prefer beginner-strength retinol and avoid using it without a clear concern.
